Receive FIFO Write

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x78
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Writes data into the RX FIFO (or RBR if FIFOs disabled) in FIFO access test mode. Only valid when FIFO_ACCESS is configured and FAR[0]=1.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:10] reserved rw 0x0 -
[9] rffe w 0x0 RFFE
[8] rfpe w 0x0 RFPE
[7:0] rfwd w 0x0 RFWD

Field Descriptions

rffe - RFFE

Receive FIFO Framing Error - inject framing error into RX FIFO.

rfpe - RFPE

Receive FIFO Parity Error - inject parity error into RX FIFO.

rfwd - RFWD

Receive FIFO Write Data - data byte to push into RX FIFO.
